## Summary

What changed and why?

## Roadmap / issue

- Related issue:
- Roadmap item:

## Dual-surface checklist

- [ ] Human surface considered/updated
- [ ] AI surface considered/updated
- [ ] Source of truth unchanged or documented
- [ ] Provenance/refs included where relevant
- [ ] Trust/sensitivity boundary preserved
- [ ] Rollback/snapshot/recovery path preserved

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run docs:llms:check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run android:check`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run package:dev`

Notes on skipped checks:

## Security/privacy

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private URLs, or personal data added
- [ ] Generated HTML sandbox/network boundaries preserved
- [ ] No approval/trust boundary weakened without explicit review

## Screenshots / media

Attach screenshots/GIFs for UI-visible changes.
